headline: Starter Site plus WhatsApp lead-capture setup delivered from structured homework and a QA gate.
firstBuyer: Service businesses already selling through WhatsApp but lacking a credible website, lead capture, and follow-up system.
boundaries: Starting delivery before complete client homework.
Overpromising AI automation without fallback paths.
intakeQuestions: What does your business sell and who buys most often?
What should customers do first: WhatsApp, call, book, visit, or pay deposit?
What services, prices, locations, photos, testimonials, and FAQs can you provide?
Which repeated WhatsApp questions waste the most time?
What would make this project successful 30 days after launch?
